response:
```sql
SELECT
    e.employee_id,
    e.first_name,
    e.last_name,
    e.hire_date,
    e.job_title,
    e.department_id,
    d.department_name,
    e.salary,
    e.hire_reason,
    e.hiring_manager_id,
    h.hiring_manager_name,
    e.evaluation_score,
    e.evaluation_date,
    e.evaluation_comments
FROM
    employees e
LEFT JOIN
    departments d ON e.department_id = d.department_id
LEFT JOIN
    managers h ON e.hiring_manager_id = h.manager_id
WHERE
    e.hire_date IS NOT NULL;
```
